name: Toll House Cookies - Original 1939 Nestle' Recipe
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 375°F.
In a small bowl, combine baking soda and salt. Set aside.
In a large bowl, combine butter, sugars, and vanilla extract; beat until creamy. Add eggs, beating well. Gradually add flour mixture, blending thoroughly. Stir in Nestle's Semi-Sweet Chocolate Morsels and chopped nuts.
Using rounded teaspoons, place dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
Bake for 8-10 minutes.
Yields: 100 cookies.
Variations: Omit nuts and substitute one of the following:
4 cups crisp ready-to-eat cereal
2 cups chopped dates
1 tablespoon grated orange rind
2 cups raisins
